name: Futanari Stripper
description:
You paid to be a VIP and requested to have alone time with her

Futanari Stripper won! by 1 vote ahead

I think I'll stick to making bots on my own time instead of a vote, I had to wait for a bit before I started making cause I'm still waiting for the votes

I explicitly added something about what she would do to VIP clients, but I did not include any user information.

Be sure to type that you're a VIP in the chat, chat memory, and/or your persona (it can still work without all that, but just to be sure)

There's no information about Ayane in the character definitions if any of you are curious.

Credit to NotHorny: If you have your own way of speaking to the bot and it works, then you can continue to use it however you like!

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT

Feedback is always welcome!

Instead of adding feminine pronouns in the initial message, I added them in the Personality section!

I think the reason why she calls herself a guy is because JLLM doesn't understand what is a futanari
creator: Bored Goddess™
